title: calophyllum cerasiferum
intro: Calophyllum cerasiferum, also known as the Yellow Dragon's Blood Tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as calophyllic acid and cerasiferin. The health benefits of Calophyllum cerasiferum include its potential use in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its antiviral and antiparasitic properties. Calophyllum cerasiferum is often prepared into herbal preparations such as extracts, tinctures, and oils, which can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
